parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ name: $('Filter Markdown Files').item.json.filePath, text: String($json.data ?? ''), indexing_technique: 'high_quality', process_rule: { mode: 'custom', rules: { pre_processing_rules: [{ id: 'remove_extra_spaces', enabled: true }, { id: 'remove_urls_emails', enabled: false }], segmentation: { separator: '\n\n', max_tokens: 1800, chunk_overlap: 200 } } } }) }}

meta.description: Syncs markdown docs from a GitLab repository to a Dify Knowledge Base. Triggered by platform workflow-service via webhook. Progress is reported back via progressCallbackUrl.
